StepAction: Idle: chain-identity-breaking event not yet observed
Resolve providerClass via classifyProvider(providerId); apply classifier matrix on (event.kind, providerClass) → ContinuationDecision
MessageV2.stream(sessionID); filter mutation-class tool parts; truncate to last 5; render digest entries; persist to session.execution.recentBreakDigest
Condition: digest captured OR sentinel marker on failure (DD-8)

StepAction: If decision.breaksChain: dynamic import @opencode-ai/provider-codex/continuation; invalidateContinuationFamily(sessionID); log info / warn (non-fatal)
Condition: chain invalidated OR no-op for SL provider

StepAction: If decision.injectsChainInit OR decision.injectsAmnesia: persist PendingInjection { chainInit, amnesia, digest, reason, ts } to session.execution.pendingContinuationInjection
If decision.bumpsRebindEpoch: RebindEpoch.bumpEpoch({ sessionID, trigger: event.kind }); rate-limit window enforced; session.rebind event emitted with chainBreakClass payload
RuntimeEventService.append chain.commitment.captured (if digest captured) + chain.init.injected OR chain.init.skipped
Skip digest capture (decision.capturesDigest=false); evaluate remaining decision flags
Condition: passthrough to A3 (may still bump epoch for capability_layer_refresh)

StepAction: Continuation.run returns ContinuationOutcome { decision, digest } to caller
Condition: caller continues (next outbound build is async)

StepAction: Idle: prompt builder not yet entered for next outbound
Read session.execution.pendingContinuationInjection; if chainInit flag set, buildChainInitNoticeFragment({ reason, digest, anchorKind? }); attach to prompt under <chain_init_notice> markers
Condition: fragment built OR no pending injection

StepAction: For each chain_stable-tagged fragment, compare current rebind epoch to fragment.lastRenderedAtEpoch; recompute when stale; bundle_user re-evaluates agents_md / amnesia_notice / environment_context
Clear session.execution.pendingContinuationInjection (once-after-chain-break consumption); prompt finalised and dispatched to provider
Provider receives prompt; new chain established (SS) or stateless replay continues (SL); AI sees chain-init notice in first reasoning pass
